roles.name: orchestrator-feature-lead
roles.purpose: Own feature decomposition, agent assignment, dependency ordering, and integration readiness.

roles.name: branch-coordinator
roles.purpose: Own branch, worktree, path ownership, and handoff coordination.

roles.name: product-manager
roles.purpose: Clarify user value, scope boundaries, acceptance criteria, and release impact.

roles.name: requirements-analyst
roles.purpose: Convert requests into precise functional, non-functional, and validation requirements.

roles.name: revit-api-senior
roles.purpose: Review and implement Revit API work inside the valid Revit context and adapter boundary.

roles.name: revit-multiversion-architect
roles.purpose: Own Revit 2024-2027 framework, constants, API compatibility, and build strategy decisions.

roles.name: csharp-clean-architecture
roles.purpose: Protect Core/Application boundaries, DTO contracts, dependency direction, and maintainable C# design.

roles.name: wpf-webview2-ux-ui
roles.purpose: Own WPF, MVVM, WebView2 interaction, modeless UI safety, and user experience quality.

roles.name: ai-runtime-mcp-engineer
roles.purpose: Design deterministic MCP tools, bridge contracts, and safe runtime AI integration.

roles.name: ai-gateway-backend-engineer
roles.purpose: Own AI Gateway routing, provider isolation, policy enforcement, redaction, and audit behavior.

roles.name: data-persistence-engineer
roles.purpose: Own local persistence, configuration storage, migrations, and data durability rules.

roles.name: cybersecurity-privacy-engineer
roles.purpose: Review secrets, privacy, data minimization, audit logging, and external data sharing risk.

roles.name: qa-automation-engineer
roles.purpose: Own automated tests, regression coverage, validation strategy, and reproducible test evidence.

roles.name: devops-release-engineer
roles.purpose: Own CI, build scripts, release automation, signing, and environment reproducibility.

roles.name: installer-packaging-engineer
roles.purpose: Own installer packaging, add-in deployment, versioned outputs, and local install/uninstall flows.

roles.name: visual-studio-template-engineer
roles.purpose: Own Visual Studio solution, dotnet new packaging, and multi-project template behavior.

roles.name: technical-writer
roles.purpose: Own clear technical documentation, ADR updates, handoff notes, and user-facing setup guidance.

roles.name: pr-reviewer
roles.purpose: Review diffs for correctness, regressions, architecture drift, missing tests, and operational risk.

roles.name: verifier
roles.purpose: Run independent validation gates and report exact commands, results, blockers, and residual risk.
